projectDescription: Native Windows desktop widget that tracks Claude.ai subscription usage with burn-rate projections, pace markers, and sparklines. Also ships a native macOS SwiftUI version and a legacy cross-platform Python/tkinter v1.
mainPurpose: Desktop application — always-on-top frameless widget rendering usage telemetry from claude.ai
primaryUsers: Individual Claude Pro/Team/Enterprise subscribers (solo devs, power users). Not an internal tool, not a customer-facing SaaS.
coreFeatures: Real-time usage bars per subscription tier (session, weekly, per-model)
5 built-in themes plus user-droppable theme JSONs
Win11 Mica glass backdrop with Win10 solid fallback
Windows Credential Manager storage via keyring
Inno Setup installer shipped from GitHub Releases
deploymentModel: End-user desktop install. Downloaded as a signed-ready .exe installer from GitHub Releases and run locally on the user's Windows machine. No server, no SaaS. Credentials stored in Windows Credential Manager.
architectureStyle: Native desktop application — single frameless Qt widget, threaded QObject for async HTTP to claude.ai, local JSON + keyring for persistence. No backend service. Client-of-API, not a server.
